# Coverage Period

Acme Shop provides a standard manufacturer warranty of one year from the purchase date for its electronics. This warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship when the product is used normally. However, it does not cover accidental damage, exposure to liquids, or repairs that were not authorized.

[Source: warranty.md#coverage-period]
